content.en:
Time flies.

The atmosphere of the Huoxi space-time battlefield has become depressing, and the competition and friction between the major divisions have become frequent.

It's all because the battle of luck is about to begin.

Arrow's main department.

Inside a magnificent palace.

A peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse appeared and participated in this meeting, and it was an Ultimate Ancient Demon who presided over this meeting.

Rumble!!!!

The majestic body sat on the grand throne, and every scale on his body exuded an extremely terrifying aura, and a wisp of power seemed to be able to penetrate many time and space.

He is the ultimate ancient demon - the Immortal!

There are a total of six ultimate ancient demons in the main department of the mother of Luo, and the underworld is the weakest one among them, but this is not a war involving the life and death of the main department of the mother of Luo, and there is no need to alarm all the "four four seven" ultimate ancient demons.

Therefore, it is enough for the Immortal Ancient Demon to preside.

"I've seen the great Lord of the Ancient Demon of the Underworld!"

A group of peak ancient demon-level powerhouses said respectfully.

He looked at the group of peak ancient demon-level powerhouses below, revealing a look of satisfaction, these are all peak ancient demon-level powerhouses in the main department of Aluo Mother, and any one of them has the hope of breaking through to the ultimate ancient demon.

Even some very weak peak ancient demons can't be said to have no hope of breaking through.

Thinking that at the beginning, his strength was not too strong among the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, and some of the peak-level ancient demon-level powerhouses below had a higher status than him at the beginning, but he broke through to become the ultimate ancient demon, and those peak ancient demons are still peak ancient demons.

Of course, over the years, many peak ancient demons have fallen in wars with other masters, or forcibly attacked the ultimate ancient demons and failed to fall.

There are only ten peak ancient demons left who are truly his contemporaries.

"Everyone, the battle for the luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space is about to begin, last time it was the main department of Zhenyou who obtained the final luck, with the help of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, but they were unlucky, even with the help of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, they still did not let that peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse break through. But this time, we have to win the battle of luck!"

Stygian said.

"Yes!"

Many peak Ancient Demon levels are ready to move, who doesn't want to become the ultimate Ancient Demon, they all want to!

Becoming the ultimate ancient demon, that is, the supreme existence, it is almost impossible to fall, and I have not heard of any ultimate ancient demon falling.

And the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse has fallen a lot of times in the killing, after all, if the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse is killed with the ultimate ancient demon, he will definitely be easily killed.

So, they dream of becoming the ultimate ancient demon!

"Lord Immortal Ancient Demon, I want to compete in this battle of luck. A peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse spoke.

The other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses looked at this one and showed surprise one by one.

Peak Ancient Demon Level Powerhouse - Telos!

This is also a legendary peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, and his strength is extremely powerful, but he didn't participate in the previous dozens of time-space ancient demon pillar luck battles, but he didn't expect to participate this time.

"Telos, I didn't expect you to participate, yes, count you in a place!"

With a wave of his hand, a leaf landed in front of Telos.

This is the ultimate space-time treasure leaf, as long as you carry this kind of leaf, you can ignore the rules of the Huoxi space-time battlefield and let the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse enter.

Of course, the Ultimate Space-Time Treasure Leaf is not easy to obtain, but it is refined from the Ultimate Space-Time by the Ultimate Ancient Demon-level powerhouse.

And this will take an incomparably long time, so the main body of Ah Luo does not have many ultimate space-time treasure leaves, and there is no way to let all the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses descend on the Huoxi space-time battlefield.

Therefore, only peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses who are willing to compete for luck can apply to obtain such an ultimate space-time treasure leaf.

Of course, even if other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses can't enter, they can still manipulate the war in the outside world and provide all kinds of convenience and support for the war.

"Lord Immortal Ancient Demon, I'm going to participate too!"

"Lord Immortal Ancient Demon, I'm also participating!"

One after another, the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses stood up to participate, almost all of them were extremely powerful peak-level ancient demon-level powerhouses, who were once members of the emperor list, and now their strength is extremely terrifying.

In the end, the twenty-four peak ancient demon-level powerhouses obtained the ultimate space-time treasure leaf and had the qualifications to enter the Huoxi space-time battlefield.

Next, they will participate in the battle on behalf of the Arrow Mother Fortress and seize the luck, and as long as the luck of the main department of the Arrow Mother ranks first in the overall rank, they can obtain the temporary possession of the Space-Time Ancient Demon Pillar, and they can use the Space-Time Ancient Demon Pillar to impact the ultimate Ancient Demon Realm.......

Of course, these twenty-four peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, whoever has the highest total amount of Qi Luck can obtain the qualification to impact the ultimate Ancient Demon-level realm.

Whew!!

Twenty peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses have entered the Huoxi space-time battlefield, and their arrival has made many Ancient Demon-level powerhouses in the Arrow Mu Fortress realize that the war has completely arrived.

"Twenty-four peak ancient demon-level powerhouses are here, it seems that the battle of luck is about to begin!"

At this time, the Huoxi space-time battlefield is the real battlefield, the emperor level is not as good as a dog, and the ancient demon level is all over the ground.

Really.

Soon after, Ye Tian obtained a battle array inheritance, which was a war that required a large number of ancient demon-level powerhouses to unite, with such a war, in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, when the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse was suppressed, he could fight against the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse.

Of course, even so, it is still possible to fall when encountering a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse.

......

"Lord Stygian, do you have any instructions for me?"

Ye Tian looked at the bewitching woman with a devil-level figure in front of him and asked.

He didn't know much about this Stygian Ancient Demon, he only knew that he was a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse in the main department of Aluo's mother, and his 2.9 strength should be very good, and he used to be the first on the Emperor List in a certain period, maybe not as good as Amusha's deterrent power during the Emperor List period, but it was definitely not weak.

Now, Mingya has broken through to the limit of the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, and it should be an almost invincible existence.

However, many peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses have cultivated to this realm, reaching a level that is almost impossible to improve, and the difference in strength is not very large.

"God, I know a little bit about you, your strength is very good, and you should be able to gain a lot of luck in this war. But your luck is one of the overall luck of the Arrowmu Fortress, and I want you to sign a contract with me to give me your luck. In this way, you have killed the ancient demon-level powerhouses of the other main divisions, and what has increased my luck is mine!"

The Ancient Demon said.
